summary: Vertical bystander field footage, posted by CBS News, of officers in tactical vests at an airport. Two men wear vests labeled 'ERO' and one a vest labeled 'POLICE'; an officer in a tan uniform and boonie hat crouches over flats of bottled water beside blue trash bins, handing water to travelers waiting in a snaking queue near United Airlines stanchions and a flight-information display. A CBS eye logo sits at upper left and a pinned label reads 'George Bush Intercontinental Airport'. The audio is ambient terminal noise.

script.scene: An officer in a vest labeled 'ERO' stands among travelers in a queue; an officer in a tan uniform and boonie hat crouches over flats of bottled water by blue bins. Label: 'George Bush Intercontinental Airport'.
Officers in 'POLICE' and 'ERO' vests stand near the queue by a blue trash bin while a traveler takes a water bottle; United stanchions and a flight display behind.

notable_text: ERO; POLICE; George Bush Intercontinental Airport
